message:
test(engine): expand control_plane_policy_diagnostics enrichment to 31 tests

Add 12 behavioral edge-case tests: severity ordering, release-blocking
classification, category string uniqueness, error code display, emitter
lifecycle, report serde roundtrip, remediation guidance preservation,
diagnostics-at-severity filtering, and BTreeMap determinism verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
